Chat Edit: '5. Security & Authenticity
Missing:
Secure handling of user code and credentials
Authentic Copilot branding, legal compliance, and telemetry
Privacy controls (data sent to Copilot, opt-out options)
Secure update mechanism for app and extensions
6. Performance & Scalability
Missing:
Efficient handling of large files and projects
Scalable model loading (beyond 512MB MMF simulation)
Real-time collaboration (Live Share, remote pair programming)
Cloud sync and backup
/No Simulation Code/Mocked/Placeholding/Bare Minimum

Everything else is being done except these two, please make a super thorough todos and start and finish them and then well rerun the audit 

//make todos and finish '
